mapper.select: select * from student_learning_activity where tenant_id=#{tenantId} and course_id=#{courseId} and user_id=#{userId} and del_flag='0' order by occurred_at desc,id desc limit 100
mapper.insert: insert into student_learning_activity( tenant_id,user_id,course_id,activity_type,target_id,target_title,target_detail, occurred_at,metadata_json,del_flag,create_by,create_time) select #{tenantId},#{userId},#{courseId},#{activityType},#{targetId},#{targetTitle},#{targetDetail}, now(),cast(#{metadataJson} as jsonb),'0',#{createBy},now() where not exists ( select 1 from student_learning_activity where tenant_id=#{tenantId} and user_id=#{userId} and course_id=#{courseId} and activity_type=#{activityType} and target_id is not distinct from #{targetId} and del_flag='0' and occurred_at > now() - interval '60 seconds' )
